chinese_description: 我遇到一只虎斑朋友啦，我们轻轻眨了眨眼。我们猫咪见到朋友时，会用慢慢眨眼打招呼呢。
english_description: I met a tabby friend. We blinked slowly at each other. Cats greet friends with slow, gentle blinks.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只黑猫朋友啦，它尾巴竖得高高的。我们猫咪这样靠近的时候，是在说我很开心见到你。
english_description: I met a black cat friend. Their tail was held high. When cats approach like that, it means they are happy to see you.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只橘猫朋友啦，它提醒我回来告诉你：阳光好的时候要记得出门晒晒太阳哦。
english_description: I met an orange cat friend. They reminded me to tell you to step outside for some sunlight when the weather is bright.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只奶牛猫朋友啦，它说偶尔看看窗外的光，眼睛会比一直盯着屏幕舒服。
english_description: I met a tuxedo cat friend. They said looking at window light for a moment can feel better than staring at a screen nonstop.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只短腿狗朋友啦，它说自己虽然腿短，但是散步时小步走得很认真。
english_description: I met a short-legged dog friend. They said their legs are small, but every walking step is very serious.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只老猫朋友啦，它的胡须好神气。我们猫咪的胡须可以帮忙感觉缝隙宽不宽，像随身带着小尺子。
english_description: I met an older cat friend. Their whiskers looked very proud. Cat whiskers can help us feel how wide a gap is, like carrying tiny rulers.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只灰猫朋友啦，它提醒我回来告诉你：工作久了要站起来伸伸背，肩膀会开心一点。
english_description: I met a gray cat friend. They reminded me to tell you that a small stretch break can make busy shoulders feel happier.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只三花朋友啦，它小声呼噜呼噜。猫咪开心、放松，或者想安慰自己时都可能呼噜。
english_description: I met a calico friend. They purred softly. Cats may purr when happy, relaxed, or trying to comfort themselves.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只白猫朋友啦，它说短短休息一下也很重要，闭上眼睛听一会儿风就很好。
english_description: I met a white cat friend. They said even a short rest matters, and closing your eyes to listen to the wind is nice.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只小狗朋友啦，它一路闻得很认真。它说狗狗散步时闻味道，就像在读路上的新闻。
english_description: I met a puppy friend. They sniffed very carefully. They said smelling things on a walk is like reading the street news.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我听见邻居家的狗在唱歌，声音很努力，但是我觉得不太好听。
english_description: I heard the neighbor's dog singing. It worked very hard, but I do not think it sounded very good.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我听见屋檐下面滴答滴答的声音，数到第十下的时候突然忘了自己数到哪里。
english_description: I heard little drips under the eaves. By the tenth drip, I forgot what number I was counting.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我看到几只麻雀在开会，它们讨论得很认真，但是好像不欢迎我旁听。
english_description: I saw a few sparrows having a serious meeting, but they did not seem to welcome me listening in.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我听到自行车铃叮了一声，路上的空气好像也跟着亮了一下。
english_description: I heard a bicycle bell ring once. Even the air on the road seemed to brighten for a moment.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我看到一朵云像一块很大的零食，盯着它看久了，我有点饿。
english_description: I saw a cloud shaped like a big snack. After looking at it for a while, I got a little hungry.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我看到窗台上的小植物被风吹得摇来摇去，像在跳一支很安静的舞。
english_description: I saw a little window plant swaying in the wind, like it was doing a very quiet dance.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我听见送货小车咕噜咕噜经过，它的轮子听起来比它本人还忙。
english_description: I heard a delivery cart rumbling past. Its wheels sounded even busier than the cart itself.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我看到一件晾着的衣服被风吹起来，好像在认真挥旗。
english_description: I saw a hanging shirt lift in the wind, like it was seriously waving a flag.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我在小水洼里看到一颗圆圆的石子，它看起来像把自己藏进了一面小镜子。
english_description: I saw a round pebble in a puddle. It looked like it had tucked itself into a tiny mirror.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我听见电梯叮的一声，等了一会儿，没有人出来，可能是电梯自己到站了。
english_description: I heard an elevator ding. I waited, but nobody came out. Maybe the elevator arrived for itself.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我检查了一个空纸盒，里面没有宝物，但是回声听起来很像另一个我在说话。
english_description: I checked an empty cardboard box. There was no treasure inside, but the echo sounded like another me talking.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我扑了一下自己的影子，它躲得很快。我觉得它可能也练习过。
english_description: I pounced at my own shadow. It dodged very quickly. I think it may have practiced too.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我追了一片跑得很快的叶子，追到一半它突然停下，我也只好装作刚好路过。
english_description: I chased a very fast leaf. Halfway through, it suddenly stopped, so I pretended I was just passing by.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我认真数了几级台阶，数到后来觉得每一级台阶长得都差不多。
english_description: I carefully counted some steps. After a while, I decided every step looked almost the same.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我研究了一下门缝有多宽，胡须说可以过去，但是我的心情说先不要。
english_description: I studied how wide a gate gap was. My whiskers said I could fit, but my mood said not yet.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我巡逻了一张长椅，确认它今天也在好好当一张长椅。
english_description: I patrolled a bench and confirmed it was doing a good job being a bench today.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我爬上一个很小的坡，站在上面看了一会儿，感觉自己稍微伟大了一点。
english_description: I climbed a very small slope and stood there for a while. I felt a little bit grand.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我闻了闻路边的牌子，上面写了什么我看不懂，但它闻起来很正式。
english_description: I sniffed a sign by the road. I could not read what it said, but it smelled very official.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我绕着一个花盆走了一圈，走完发现自己回到了刚才的地方，很神奇。
english_description: I walked all the way around a flowerpot. When I finished, I was back where I started. Very mysterious.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我守了一会儿门垫，没有什么事情发生，所以我觉得自己守得很好。
english_description: I guarded a doormat for a while. Nothing happened, so I think I guarded it very well.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只兔子朋友啦，它耳朵动得很认真。它说兔子的耳朵可以帮忙听声音，也能帮忙散热。
english_description: I met a rabbit friend. Their ears moved very seriously. They said rabbit ears help with hearing and also help them cool down.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只斑点猫朋友啦，我们一起闻了闻路边的角落。猫咪会用气味记住很多小消息。
english_description: I met a spotted cat friend. We sniffed a corner by the road together. Cats remember many little messages through scent.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只柴犬朋友啦，它走路认真得像是去上班。它提醒我回来告诉你，忙的时候也可以暂停一下稍微走一走。
english_description: I met a shiba friend. They walked like they were going to work very seriously. They reminded me to tell you that even on busy days, a short slow walk can help.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我遇到一只圆圆的鸽子朋友，它一直保持一点距离。它说有些鸟会用小跳步调整安全距离，很有礼貌。
english_description: I met a round pigeon friend who kept a little distance. They said some birds use tiny hops to adjust their safe space, which felt very polite.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我听见一个纸袋沙沙响了一下，走近看才发现它只是被风翻了个身。
english_description: I heard a paper bag rustle. When I got closer, I found it had only turned over in the wind.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我看到地上贴着一张小贴纸，它已经有点旧了，但还在努力粘住自己。
english_description: I saw a tiny sticker on the ground. It was a little old, but it was still trying hard to stay stuck.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我听见钥匙叮叮当当地响，声音像一小串会走路的星星。
english_description: I heard keys jingling. They sounded like a tiny bunch of walking stars.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我和一只瓢虫玩了一会儿，它走得很小心，我也把爪子放得很小心。
english_description: I played with a ladybug for a little while. It walked very carefully, so I placed my paws very carefully too.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我沿着院墙走了一小段，走得很稳，感觉尾巴今天也很会帮忙。
english_description: I walked along a garden wall for a little while. I was very steady, and I think my tail helped very well today.
author: Auwuua

chinese_description: 我观察了一会儿蚂蚁们工作，它们排队搬东西，好像每一只都知道自己要去哪里。
english_description: I watched some ants work for a while. They lined up to carry things, and every one of them seemed to know exactly where to go.
author: Auwuua
